headline: Neuroblastoma Treatment Market Analysis Report 2025-2035 - Regional Players and Local Manufacturers are Expected to Play an Important Role in Future Growth
summary: Neuroblastoma, an aggressive cancer mainly affecting infants, is seeing advances in treatment options, driving market growth. Immunotherapy, significantly boosting survival rates in high-risk cases, alongside gene therapies and CAR-T cell trials, is at the forefront. However, high treatment costs pose challenges, limiting access in low-resource areas. Key players like Novartis and Eli Lilly are spearheading innovation in effective therapies.
